characters.name: Anemia
characters.description: Anemiais a main character in the traditional animation segmentAnemia and Iodine, seen on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. She is a redheaded anthropomorphic female cat in a purple dress. Her specialty is in occult arts, including exorcism, clairvoyance and communicating with spirits.

characters.name: Anemia
characters.description: Anemiais a main character in the traditional animation segmentAnemia and Iodine, seen on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. She is a redheaded anthropomorphic female cat in a purple dress. Her specialty is in occult arts, including exorcism, clairvoyance and communicating with spirits.

characters.name: August
characters.description: Augustis a character onThe Off-Beats, seen on theNickelodeonsketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. He is the most technologically inclined of the Off-Beats but many of his gadgets, however, would often fail or backfire unexpectedly. While some episodes imply that August makes his gadgets himself, others imply that he purchases them. He also has an interest in impressingthe Popularsand gaining their respect. August and his dog,September, are the only characters to appear at least once in every episode of the segment. He strongly resembles Dilbert, a character from a comic strip by the same name. August is the only character to appear in everyThe Off-Beatssegment, sinceBetty Anne Bongo,RepunzilandTommydo not appear in "My Dog Can Talk" or "The Robodog", and September doesn't appear in "Repunzil and the Sweepstakes".

characters.name: Beth
characters.description: Bethis a character onThe Off-Beats,seen on theNickelodeonanimated scetch comedyKaBlam!. She isTina's redheaded sidekick and best friend. Usually, Beth is the one who shouts "Adult!" when a grown-up is near so thatThe Popularscan pull their nice act off. During theValentine's Day special, she andTommydated. It did not end well, however, because they came from opposing groups, who couldn't stand each other. Even though Beth and Tommy had to break up, they remained on good terms. Beth has ringlets and a pink dress. She is of similiar age as her peers.

characters.name: Betty Anne Bongo
characters.description: Betty Anne Bongois a character onThe Off-Beats,seen on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. Betty Anne is the unofficial leader of the Off-Beats, the oldest and most realistically-thinking member of the group. She likes playing the bongos (hence her last name) and hanging out with the rest of the Off-Beats (Tommy,August,SeptemberandRepunzil). Betty Anne has short sandy blonde hair. She is normally seen wearing a mini-red beret, horn-rimmed eyeglasses (which she can't see without, as seen in one episode), green scarf and shirt within a red dress, green tights and shoes. Betty Anne is the unofficial leader of the Off-Beats, the oldest and most realistically-thinking member of the group. She likes playing the bongos (hence her last name) and hanging out with the rest of the Off-Beats (Tommy,August,SeptemberandRepunzil).

characters.name: Bianca Lo Bianca
characters.description: Bianca Lo Biancais a secondary character in the traditional animation segmentSniz and Fondue, seen on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. She is in a relationship withSnuppa Doojers, and they share a house withSniz BronkowskiandSqueaky Fondue. Like most other characters, Bianca is a ferret-like creature with tan fur and a red nose. She has a poofy-blonde hairstyle and wears pink clothing. Bianca can be easily irritated, especially when Sniz and Fondue are up to their antics. Like most other characters, Bianca is a ferret-like creature with tan fur and a red nose. She has a poofy-blonde hairstyle and wears pink clothing. Bianca can be easily irritated, especially when Sniz and Fondue are up to their antics.

characters.name: Bill the Lab Guy
characters.description: Bill the Lab Guyis a secondary protagonist on the live-action/stop motion segmentAction League Now!seen onNickelodeon'sAll That, andKaBlam!. A scientist who makes usually-failed experiments, he is mostly useless to the Action League when they need his help, and almost always speaks in a monotone voice. One of Bill's catchphrases is "[...] I was afraid of this!" when something goes wrong. Another catchphrase is "There's nothing I can do!" when he believes that he can't do anything to solve a problem.

characters.name: Billy
characters.description: Billyis a character onThe Off-Beats, seen on theNickelodeonsketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. The youngest member ofthe Populars, he wears a propeller cap and is of Latino descendent. A running gag in the series usually involves him saying something that would makeTinaangry and then the Populars would literally throw him out of the group.

characters.name: Bob
characters.description: Bobis a main protagonist of the stop motion animation segmentPrometheus and Bob, seen on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. He is a caveman that gets educated on how to live in modern society by an alien namedPrometheus. Bob used to be full of hair but now has none due to a laser incident in the first tape Prometheus recorded of him ("Tape 1"). Bob is usually depicted as being scared by Prometheus's lessons due to them either being too vague to make full sense for him (examples include watching television, celebrating a birthday and doing laundry) or Prometheus's way of teaching being too forceful for a slow learner like him. A simplemonkeyoften interrupting their lessons with pranks doesn't help, either. Despite this, Bob is usually an optimist and he can understand Prometheus's knowledge well (like learning how to use a spear) if left alone.

characters.name: Braingel
characters.description: Braingelis a protagonist inThe Little Freaks,seen on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. The unofficial leader of the Little Freaks, he has an intelligence quotient of a combination of Thomas Edison (inventor of the light bulb), Alexander Graham Bell (inventor of the telephone), Guglielmo Marconi (inventor of the radio) and other inventors from the past. Braingel wears a green sweater with blue pants and sneakers. Also, on the top of his head he has a big brain in a glass jar. Inside, a tiny root beer bottle with a part of a mace in it charges his brain which gives him more power. Braingel is of Asian descent.

characters.name: Captain Snuffy
characters.description: Captain Snuffy is a minor character from theHenry and Junestories. He isHenryshand puppet and usually remains silent, althought duringHurts So Good!!the puppet operated as an telecaller alongside other one-off characters likeJeff the Sad Dinosaur,HectorandDr. Ferdinand Blem. Captain Snuffy has grayish eyes and hair, with his beard styled as a side one. He wears a long-sleeved blue pullover over a brownish trouser, while wearing darker brown shoes. During the Staple-A-Thon inHurts So Good!!the Captain is seen smoking with his pipe.

characters.name: Dawn Stockdale
characters.description: Dawn Stockdaleis a secondary character in theHenry & Junesegments on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. Dawn only appears in the Season 4 episode "A Nut in Every Bite!" where she is on break from boarding school in Switzerland and gets to visit the show's studio courtesy of her grandfather, network executiveFred Stockdale. Dawn has blonde hair kept behind a light brown hairband, blue-grayish eyes and light skin. She wears a dark gray business jacket, a knee-length skirt and a blouse, of which both are of different mauve colors. The overall color mix of her clothing is thus very similar to that of her grandfather. Dawn is easily amused, especially whenHenry(who has a crush on her, but she in return does not have feelings of that way) hurts himself.
characters.personality_section: Dawn is easily amused, especially whenHenry(who has a crush on her, but she in return does not have feelings of that way) hurts himself.

characters.name: Dropsy
characters.description: Dropsyis a main character in the traditional animation segmentAnemia and Iodine, seen on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. He is energetic and wants to help his sister,Anemia, and her best friend,Iodine, with their journey to a manor in search of paranormal activity, even though they don't want him to get involved.

characters.name: Dubbs
characters.description: Mike and Michael Dubbs, known mononymously asDubbs, are protagonists inThe Little Freaks,seen on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. Dubbs consists of two conjoined twins, sharing the same body. They wear a white shirt, tan pants and sneakers, with one light blue and the other one orange. Mike and Michael also wear a big clock medallion around their neck. Mike and Michael don't really have arguments, mostly getting along with each other. Even though they don't look the same, Dubbs shares the same body, mind, dialogue, heart, and ideas. Mike and Michael don't really have arguments, mostly getting along with each other. Even though they don't look the same, Dubbs shares the same body, mind, dialogue, heart, and ideas.

characters.name: Ed the Educational Otter
characters.description: Ed the Educational Otteris a secondary character in theHenry & Junesegments on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. Only appearing in the Season 3 episode "Your Logo Here!," Ed helpsHenryandJuneadjust to the show's new motto of "Preparing Young Minds for Tomorrow's Future...Today" by conveying educational messages to the audience through songs (similar to Barney, the titular character in the PBS children's television seriesBarney & Friends). However, Henry and June disobey Ed's teachings, and trap him in a net by the end of the episode, teaching the audience that if they want to be a guest on a TV show, to not be a twit or in a net they'll go!

characters.name: Fred Stockdale
characters.description: Fred Stockdale(orMr. Stockdale)is a secondary character in theHenry & Junesegments of theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. He is the show's network executive. Stockdale is normally seen in a three-piece suit (with the exception of episode "The KaBlair! Witch Project" where he wears a safari hat/vest and a red plaid shirt with white undershirt). He has gray hair and heavy wrinkles on his face. A veteran of the U.S. Army, Stockdale acts really senile, especially by messing up Henry and June's names, and will do anything to give the show good ratings, including getting them into physical accidents. His granddaughter,Dawn, says he hasn't been the same sinceCharlie's Angelswas canceled.

characters.name: Grubby Groo
characters.description: Grubby Groois a character onThe Off-Beats, seen on theNickelodeonsketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. Looking like a beatnik, he is the adult friend to the Off-Beats and is the only adult that knowsthe Popularsare just mean kids, despite their "nice act" when he walks by them. In the episode "The Sprain," Grubby Groo gaveBetty Anne Bongoa junkyard sundae and in "Your Shoe's Untied" (Shoelaces), he tiedRepunzil's shoes for her.

characters.name: Hector
characters.description: Hectoris a secondary character in theHenry and Junesegments on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. Hector is temporarilyJune's new co-host (afterHenryquits) in the Season 2 episode "Won't Stick to Most Dental Work!", but she finds him useless due to his dimwitted personality.Mr. Footis then given instruction to place him in a trunk of a car outside the studio. Hector can be last seen in the Season 2 episode "Hurts So Good!!" answering calls during a "Staplethon" (a parody of a telethon).

Hector can be last seen in the Season 2 episode "Hurts So Good!!" answering calls during a "Staplethon" (a parody of a telethon).

characters.name: Henry
characters.description: Henryis a main character of theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!and its short-lived spinoff,The Henry and June Show. He co-hosts with his best friend,June. Henry is tan-skinned with freckles and has green hair. He wears a blue shirt designed with an upside-down smiley face, red pants, and yellow shoes. In Season 1, Henry is shown to be smarter than June and more like an older brother to her. In the second through fourth seasons, he is more clumsy and dimwitted. In addition, with actor Noah Segan aging asKaBlam!progresses, Henry's voice becomes deeper. In Season 1, Henry is shown to be smarter than June and more like an older brother to her. In the second through fourth seasons, he is more clumsy and dimwitted. In addition, with actor Noah Segan aging asKaBlam!progresses, Henry's voice becomes deeper. Henry is also prone to the majority of the show's accidents, including getting hurt byMr. Foot, the show's Sasquatch (Bigfoot). Henry is also seen as a romantic, having complicated crushes onAction League Now!starThundergirl(in the Season 1 episode "Comics of Champions") andDawn, network executiveFred Stockdale's granddaughter, in the Season 4 episode "A Nut In Every Bite!." Some of Henry's skills include dancing, singing (although unlike June, he tends to be more off-key) and playing the electric guitar.

characters.name: Hodge Podge
characters.description: "[...]It was tax time...but I was the one who paid the penalty!" Hodge Podgeis a secondary antagonist of the live action/stop motion segmentAction League Now!seen onNickelodeon'sAll That, andKaBlam!. As his name suggests, he is a confused mixture of many pieces. Before turning bad, Hodge Podge worked as an accountant and helped the Action League with their taxes. He was then accidentally knocked into a blender bythe Flesh, andBill the Lab Guybotched his operation, making him the mutant he is today and he blames the League for ruining his life.

characters.name: Hodge Podge

characters.name: Iodine
characters.description: Iodineis a main character in the traditional animation segmentAnemia and Iodine, seen on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. An anthromorphic wallaby (similar to Rocko ofRocko's Modern Life), she is the middle-aged of the three and isAnemia's best friend. She has teal hair, wears a red dress, and enjoys skateboarding.

characters.name: Iodine
characters.description: Iodineis a main character in the traditional animation segmentAnemia and Iodine, seen on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. An anthromorphic wallaby (similar to Rocko ofRocko's Modern Life), she is the middle-aged of the three and isAnemia's best friend. She has teal hair, wears a red dress, and enjoys skateboarding.

characters.name: Jimmy McGee
characters.description: Jimmy McGeeis a secondary character in theHenry & Junesegments on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. During the episode "You May Already Be a...KaBlammer!," McGee is hired by the network to act as a sidekick forHenryandJunein order to "spice up"KaBlam!. June appreciates Jimmy especially when he likes her jokes, but Henry isn't as receptive as Jimmy is more lukewarm to his material. Eventually,Loisshows up to help her son be more funny, but then picks a fight with Jimmy after he makes fun of Henry right in front of her. OnThe Henry and June Show's first segment, "A Show of Their Own," McGee is the announcer for the two co-hosts' live show, complete with a studio audience and a plethora of special guests. McGee's main trait is him energetically acting like a parody of late-night television comedians' sidekicks, usually shouting "AH-OOGA!" after a joke (as a tongue-in-cheek nod to Johnny Carson's sidekick, Ed McMahon, who shouted "Hiyo!" after telling one).

characters.name: Jimmy McGee
characters.description: Jimmy McGeeis a secondary character in theHenry & Junesegments on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!. During the episode "You May Already Be a...KaBlammer!," McGee is hired by the network to act as a sidekick forHenryandJunein order to "spice up"KaBlam!. June appreciates Jimmy especially when he likes her jokes, but Henry isn't as receptive as Jimmy is more lukewarm to his material. Eventually,Loisshows up to help her son be more funny, but then picks a fight with Jimmy after he makes fun of Henry right in front of her. OnThe Henry and June Show's first segment, "A Show of Their Own," McGee is the announcer for the two co-hosts' live show, complete with a studio audience and a plethora of special guests. McGee's main trait is him energetically acting like a parody of late-night television comedians' sidekicks, usually shouting "AH-OOGA!" after a joke (as a tongue-in-cheek nod to Johnny Carson's sidekick, Ed McMahon, who shouted "Hiyo!" after telling one).

characters.name: June
characters.description: Juneis a main character of theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!and its short-lived spinoff,The Henry and June Show. She co-hosts with her best friend,Henry. June is pale-skinned and has unnatural blue hair in a ponytail with a spiky fringe, but is most often seen wearing a yellow T-shirt with an orange cardigan, green plaid shorts, and uncleaned white socks with purple shoes. In a few episodes, it is revealed that she wears a white sleeveless undershirt under her T-shirt and cardigan, and one episode even shows her underwear, bloomers that match her jacket. June's characterization and personality changed significantly between the first and second seasons ofKaBlam!. In Season 1, she is shown as being overly impulsive and excitable. In Seasons 2-4, she is depicted as smart, prone to cynical remarks, and laid-back, with a fiery temper. The latter's change in characterization was very well received by fans. In addition, with actress Julia McIlvaine aging asKaBlam!progresses, June's voice becomes deeper. June's characterization and personality changed significantly between the first and second seasons ofKaBlam!. In Season 1, she is shown as being overly impulsive and excitable. In Seasons 2-4, she is depicted as smart, prone to cynical remarks, and laid-back, with a fiery temper. The latter's change in characterization was very well received by fans. In addition, with actress Julia McIlvaine aging asKaBlam!progresses, June's voice becomes deeper. One of June's most consistent traits is that she's a prankster, and often teases Henry. Usually, she's laughing at him because he gets embarrassed by hismother. June has a lot of skills. She is often shown to be quite proficient with technology, where in one episode she built a large and complex page-turning device. June can sing, dance and play the acoustic guitar.

characters.name: Justice
characters.description: Justiceis a secondary protagonist on the live action/stop motion segmentAction League Now!seen onNickelodeon'sAll That, andKaBlam!. A Golden Retriever andthe Chief's personal dog, Justice sometimes serves as the "Lassie" of the show, warning dangers to Action League members that they would be otherwise unaware of, and is likely the 2nd most intelligent member of the Action League.

characters.name: Larry Cooper
characters.description: Larry Cooperis a main protagonist onLife with Loopy, a mixed media segment seen on theNickelodeonanimated sketch comedy seriesKaBlam!.The older brother ofLoopy Cooper, he’s the self-absorbed one of the two siblings and narrates her adventures in every episode. Interests of his include listening to the band Bugsteak, watching baseball and being a fan ofThe Charlie Chicken Show. Despite disliking many of Loopy's ideas, Larry eventually does support her as the "voice of reason." Sometimes, he has his own experiences, like getting a date for his school dance through Cupid's computer love match service or having to shape up to fight back against a bully. Larry has spiky, short red hair and hazel eyes. He usually is seen wearing a plaid jacket (or a red sweater with a blue stripe in a few episodes), khaki pants and black sneakers.
